banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.message: We use cookies to run this site and, with your consent, to measure traffic and improve it. You can accept all, reject everything non-essential, or choose what to allow.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.description: Choose which cookies this site may use. You can change this at any time.

necessary.name: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site to work — sign-in, security, and remembering your choices. These cannot be switched off.

functional.name: Functional
functional.description: Remembers preferences like language or layout to improve your experience.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.description: Helps us understand how the site is used so we can improve it. Aggregated, not used to identify you.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: Used to show and measure advertising, including on other websites.

settings.title: Privacy & cookies
settings.description: Manage what this site is allowed to store on your device.
settings.statusUndecided: You haven't made a choice yet.
